description: Style NotePure police Pour homme, for men, is available in a blue flacon.Product DetailsTop notes are bergamot, grapefruit and ginger heart notes are iris, jasmine and magnolia and base notes are musk, cedarwood and cedar rootCautionFlammableKeep away from sources of ignitionKeep away from childrenDo not use near fire, flame or heatAvoid spraying near the eyesSizeQuantity: 50 ml
